steps.title: Use an opening modifier
steps.content: The words before the comma introduce a modifier of 'it' in the main clause. That opening phrase needs a participle, not a separate finite verb.

steps.title: Avoid a second main verb
steps.content: A, B, and D all contain finite verb phrases, which would not fit the opening modifier 'Originally ______ in classical Japanese.' The past participle creates the correct phrase modifying the poem. The answer is C.
